string-array.name: face_error_vendor
string-array.item: "Face unlock can't be used. Unlock your device by another method."
Unable to unlock. Partial face detected.

string-array.name: fingerprint_acquired_vendor
string-array.item: Finger placement should vary slightly each time. Please try again.

string-array.name: sms_roaming_guard_modes
string-array.item: Auto Send when in Domestic coverage

string-array.name: wfcOperatorErrorAlertMessages
string-array.item: To make calls and send messages over Wi-Fi, first ask your carrier to set up this service. Then turn on Wi-Fi calling again from Settings. (Error code: %1$s)

string-array.name: wfcOperatorErrorNotificationMessages
string-array.item: Issue registering Wi‑Fi calling with your carrier: %1$s
